title: MOLTEN
MINIMALIST.
hero.intro: Deterministic systems around probabilistic engines. Fluid intelligence held inside structural rigor.

cta.title: READY TO BUILD SOMETHING THAT WORKS?

sections.title: AGENTIC DESIGN FOUNDRY.
sections.body: Metafloor forges the rigid state machines and deterministic frameworks required to turn volatile AI models into high-conviction industrial outcomes.

cards.title: FOUNDRY, NOT AGENCY
cards.description: We do not provide services as decoration. We forge infrastructure that works.

cards.title: 1-BIT SIGNALS
cards.description: The output should resolve to conviction: yes or no, done or error, working or broken.

cards.title: SOVEREIGN TECHNICALITY
cards.description: Local compute, air-gapped security, outcome-based monetization, and systems that survive outside the demo.

sections.title: FLUID INTELLIGENCE. RIGID GRID.
sections.body: The aesthetic represents the tension between molten probabilistic engines and structural deterministic systems.

cards.title: HIGH-ENERGY RED
cards.description: Brand red carries urgency, heat, and innovation. Stark black carries rigor and grounding. White gives the system air.

cards.title: DUAL TYPOGRAPHY
cards.description: All-caps technical hierarchy for authority. Organic molten logotype for human personality and memorability.

cards.title: MOTIFS
cards.description: Molten forms, heavy dividers, dot matrices, and star cutouts as 1-bit indicators.

sections.title: ORDER WITH ASYMMETRY.
sections.body: A 12-column commitment to structure, broken by modular asymmetry, breathing room, and strong dividers that preserve hierarchy.
